providers.name: already-present
providers.notes: Checks an existing artifact root against the manifest and writes state only after verification.

providers.name: manual-copy
providers.secret_handling: does not print private local paths in JSON output
providers.notes: Copies only manifest-listed files into a partial directory, verifies hash/size, then promotes atomically.

providers.name: rclone-private
providers.source_format: private rclone remote and release path supplied outside Git
providers.secret_handling: uses subprocess list args, masks command output, and never stores config/token in repo
providers.notes: Builds safe rclone copyto commands and verifies locally. Real Drive remote execution is deferred.

providers.name: public-drive
providers.secret_handling: no credential expected; actual URL not hardcoded
providers.notes: Reserved for a future public minimal bundle, not implemented in C3.
